content.text: Plan a 5-day Japan trip — Tokyo and Kyoto, first time.

Here's a balanced first-timer route between Tokyo and Kyoto:

| Day | Base | Highlights |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Tokyo | Asakusa, Senso-ji, an evening Sumida River walk |
| 2 | Tokyo | teamLab Planets, Shibuya crossing, Shinjuku at night |
| 3 | Kyoto | Morning bullet train, Fushimi Inari, Gion |
| 4 | Kyoto | Arashiyama bamboo grove, Kinkaku-ji |
| 5 | Kyoto | Nishiki Market, a slow morning, fly home |

> [!tip] Save on rail
> A 7-day Japan Rail Pass covers the Tokyo–Kyoto bullet train both ways and pays for itself by day 3.

I saved the plan to [[Japan trip]] so you can tweak it as things firm up.
